issues.description: The condition 'HasCardOnBoard' with name 'Supernovas' is incorrect. It should use 'LeaderHasType' to check if the leader has the {Supernovas} type.

The second action is 'Rest' but the effect text says 'cannot be rested until the end of your opponent's next End Phase', which means it should give a keyword/status that prevents resting, not rest the character itself.
Missing target count specification. The effect says 'up to 1 of your opponent's Characters', so the target should have count: 1.
